prompt: A traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print depicting a lone traveler walking down a winding mountain path from high cliffs toward a calm valley below. The composition uses strong diagonal movement from top to bottom, guiding the eye downward. Flat areas of muted color, indigo and earthy tones, bold black outlines, minimal shading, visible woodblock texture. Stylized waves of clouds and layered mountains in the background. The path clearly descends toward a lowest point in the valley. No modern elements, no text, no labels.
tradition_approach: Used flat color fields, bold outlines, diagonal composition, and layered landscapes to mirror downhill movement toward a minimum.
